TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-kathethel_parain a _oemaw
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: e kakhayza'an saksaka SaiSiyat 'ima haSa' tnon.
S.PHON: ə kakhajz~ðaʔan s~θaks~θaka ʃaiʃijat ʔima haʃaʔ tnon.
S.FORM: e kakhayza'an saksaka SaiSiyat 'ima haSa' tnon.
S.PHON: ə kakhajz~ðaʔan s~θaks~θaka ʃaiʃijat ʔima haʃaʔ tnon.

TRANSL.notes: 從前賽夏人不會(用竹架子?)織布.

S.TRANSL: 從前賽夏人不會 織布.
The SaiSiyat people did not know how to weave before.

S.FORM: koSa'en tnon ka kaybaeen mina noka a biwa' sa ina toertoeroe'.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən tnon ka kajβæən mina noka a βiwaʔ s~θa ina tœrtœrœʔ.
S.FORM: koSa'en tnon ka kaybaeen mina noka a biwa' sa ina toertoeroe'.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən tnon ka kajβæən mina noka a βiwaʔ s~θa ina tœrtœrœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 據說織衣服是以前雷神教的.

TRANSL.notes: It was Kathethel who taught (them) weaving.

S.TRANSL: It was Kathethel who taught weaving.

S.FORM: biwa' 'inay rayno' mwai' kakhayzaehan sa.
S.PHON: βiwaʔ ʔinaj rajnoʔ mwaiʔ kakhajz~ðæhan s~θa.
S.FORM: biwa' 'inay rayno' mwai' kakhayzaehan sa.
S.PHON: βiwaʔ ʔinaj rajnoʔ mwaiʔ kakhajz~ðæhan s~θa.
S.TRANSL: 為此雷神從哪兒來呢?
Where does Kathethel come from?

S.FORM: koSa'en SaiSiya rima' kama'alep rima' ray 'oeS'oeSoe'an.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ʃaiʃija rimaʔ kamaʔaləp rimaʔ raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan.
S.FORM: koSa'en SaiSiya rima' kama'alep rima' ray 'oeS'oeSoe'an.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ʃaiʃija rimaʔ kamaʔaləp rimaʔ raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan.
S.TRANSL: 據說賽夏人去 ... ... 獵人去山上.
The SaiSiyats go hunting in the woods.

S.FORM: lam lampez mae'iyaeh rima' 'alep ila 'aehae' hahila rima' 'alep.
S.PHON: lam lampəz~ð mæʔijæh rimaʔ ʔaləp ila ʔæhæʔ hahila rimaʔ ʔaləp.
S.FORM: lam lampez mae'iyaeh rima' 'alep ila 'aehae' hahila rima' 'alep.
S.PHON: lam lampəz~ð mæʔijæh rimaʔ ʔaləp ila ʔæhæʔ hahila rimaʔ ʔaləp.
S.TRANSL: 有十個人去打一整天的獵.
Ten persons went hunting. The hunt lasted for one day.

S.FORM: lobihin kita'en ray 'inasal ka a pazay ray koloban ma' sizaeh ila talek.
S.PHON: loβihin kitaʔən raj ʔinas~θal ka a paz~ðaj raj koloβan maʔ s~θiz~ðæh ila talək.
S.FORM: lobihin kita'en ray 'inasal ka a pazay ray koloban ma' sizaeh ila talek.
S.PHON: loβihin kitaʔən raj ʔinas~θal ka a paz~ðaj raj koloβan maʔ s~θiz~ðæh ila talək.

TRANSL.notes: 回到工寮(沒有人),卻看見鍋子裡有飯 ... ... 在鍋子裡也有燒好的飯.

S.TRANSL: 回到工寮 ,卻看見鍋子裡有飯 ... ... 在鍋子裡也有燒好的飯.
Upon their return, they saw the rice in the pot has been cooked.

S.FORM: koSa ma' hini hiya' mwai' talek ray isason ka ka pazay hini.
S.PHON: koʃa maʔ hini hijaʔ mwaiʔ talək raj is~θas~θon ka ka paz~ðaj hini.
S.FORM: koSa ma' hini hiya' mwai' talek ray isason ka ka pazay hini.
S.PHON: koʃa maʔ hini hijaʔ mwaiʔ talək raj is~θas~θon ka ka paz~ðaj hini.
S.TRANSL: 就是說這個 ... ... 誰來到山上來煮這頓飯呢?
Who came to cook the rice?

S.FORM: lasia ray 'inasal ma' 'al'alihan bala' 'iyaralomon.
S.PHON: las~θia raj ʔinas~θal maʔ ʔalʔalihan βalaʔ ʔijaralomon.
S.FORM: lasia ray 'inasal ma' 'al'alihan bala' 'iyaralomon.
S.PHON: las~θia raj ʔinas~θal maʔ ʔalʔalihan βalaʔ ʔijaralomon.
S.TRANSL: 他們在工寮裡,很接近河川.
Their workplace is close to the river.

S.FORM: ka koSa'en kakita' So 'aehae' hahila kil 'aehae' hahila rim'an ila tatini' So'o 'aehae' honay hini 'iyalawa' kitkita' hiya' 'atomal mwai' ma' talek ka pazay 'inimita' isaa kama'alep haebaeaen rima' ila.
S.PHON: ka koʃaʔən kakitaʔ ʃo ʔæhæʔ hahila kil ʔæhæʔ hahila rimʔan ila tatiniʔ ʃoʔo ʔæhæʔ honaj hini ʔijalawaʔ kitkitaʔ hijaʔ ʔatomal mwaiʔ maʔ talək ka paz~ðaj ʔinimitaʔ is~θaa kamaʔaləp hæβææn rimaʔ ila.
S.FORM: ka koSa'en kakita' So 'aehae' hahila kil 'aehae' hahila rim'an ila tatini' So'o 'aehae' honay hini 'iyalawa' kitkita' hiya' 'atomal mwai' ma' talek ka pazay 'inimita' isaa kama'alep haebaeaen rima' ila.
S.PHON: ka koʃaʔən kakitaʔ ʃo ʔæhæʔ hahila kil ʔæhæʔ hahila rimʔan ila tatiniʔ ʃoʔo ʔæhæʔ honaj hini ʔijalawaʔ kitkitaʔ hijaʔ ʔatomal mwaiʔ maʔ talək ka paz~ðaj ʔinimitaʔ is~θaa kamaʔaləp hæβææn rimaʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 讓一個老人在這裡站崗,看看到底是誰來給獵人煮飯.
One of the elders was left to guard the place and watch who would come to cook the rice. The hunters left.

S.FORM: 'aehae' tatini' e pakitkita'en ri'sa isa 'aehae' 'ima roehaenaen ila sa'oewaz kita'en 'inaray waSal 'inaray ralom mwai' kakamehoera ka kabinao' 'al'alak 'atomal mwai' 'isaa rima' kita'en sa talek ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ tatiniʔ ə pakitkitaʔən riʔs~θa is~θa ʔæhæʔ ʔima rœhænæn ila s~θaʔœwaz~ð kitaʔən ʔinaraj waʃal ʔinaraj ralom mwaiʔ kakaməhœra ka kaβinaoʔ ʔalʔalak ʔatomal mwaiʔ ʔis~θaa rimaʔ kitaʔən s~θa talək ila.
S.FORM: 'aehae' tatini' e pakitkita'en ri'sa isa 'aehae' 'ima roehaenaen ila sa'oewaz kita'en 'inaray waSal 'inaray ralom mwai' kakamehoera ka kabinao' 'al'alak 'atomal mwai' 'isaa rima' kita'en sa talek ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ tatiniʔ ə pakitkitaʔən riʔs~θa is~θa ʔæhæʔ ʔima rœhænæn ila s~θaʔœwaz~ð kitaʔən ʔinaraj waʃal ʔinaraj ralom mwaiʔ kakaməhœra ka kaβinaoʔ ʔalʔalak ʔatomal mwaiʔ ʔis~θaa rimaʔ kitaʔən s~θa talək ila.
S.TRANSL: 晚上的時候,果真看到一位非常年輕的女子,一下子從海 ... ... 從水裡出來,走來走去燒飯.
In the evening, the elder saw a very young lady come out from the sea and saw her cook.

S.FORM: sizaeh ila talek mina Soka' 'am lobih ilahao 'am raiw ila.
S.PHON: s~θiz~ðæh ila talək mina ʃokaʔ ʔam loβih ilahao ʔam raiw ila.
S.FORM: sizaeh ila talek mina Soka' 'am lobih ilahao 'am raiw ila.
S.PHON: s~θiz~ðæh ila talək mina ʃokaʔ ʔam loβih ilahao ʔam raiw ila.

TRANSL.notes: (那位女子)煮完了,準備要跑回去時.

S.TRANSL: 煮完了,準備要跑回去時.
When the lady finished cooking, she prepared to leave.

S.FORM: noka 'isaa noka baki'? sipoti' noka hobak 'isaa 'oka' ila 'i sipoti' 'oka' ila i sahpiih ka isaa.
S.PHON: noka ʔis~θaa noka βakiʔ? s~θipotiʔ noka hoβak ʔis~θaa ʔokaʔ ila ʔi s~θipotiʔ ʔokaʔ ila i s~θahpiih ka is~θaa.
S.FORM: noka 'isaa noka baki'? sipoti' noka hobak 'isaa 'oka' ila 'i sipoti' 'oka' ila i sahpiih ka isaa.
S.PHON: noka ʔis~θaa noka βakiʔ? s~θipotiʔ noka hoβak ʔis~θaa ʔokaʔ ila ʔi s~θipotiʔ ʔokaʔ ila i s~θahpiih ka is~θaa.

TRANSL.notes: 老人用標槍擋住, (她就)無法通過那個.

S.TRANSL: 老人用標槍擋住, 無法通過那個.
The elder blocked her way and she was not able to pass through.

S.FORM: 'inay risa' isaa paehraehraengen singozawen naehaen mwai' maehraehraeng.
S.PHON: ʔinaj ris~θaʔ is~θaa pæhræhræŋən s~θiŋoz~ðawən næhæn mwaiʔ mæhræhræŋ.
S.FORM: 'inay risa' isaa paehraehraengen singozawen naehaen mwai' maehraehraeng.
S.PHON: ʔinaj ris~θaʔ is~θaa pæhræhræŋən s~θiŋoz~ðawən næhæn mwaiʔ mæhræhræŋ.
S.TRANSL: 老人跟她談話, 問她從哪裡來.
The elder talked to her and asked her where she was from.

S.FORM: nak'ini ila o 'isaa o roehaenaen ila o kama'alep lobih ila.
S.PHON: nakʔini ila o ʔis~θaa o rœhænæn ila o kamaʔaləp loβih ila.
S.FORM: nak'ini ila o 'isaa o roehaenaen ila o kama'alep lobih ila.
S.PHON: nakʔini ila o ʔis~θaa o rœhænæn ila o kamaʔaləp loβih ila.
S.TRANSL: 那天晚上,獵人回來了.
At night, the hunters returned home.

S.FORM: 'aehae' ka 'aehoe' minsa'la' mwai' mwai' risaa isaa mwai' wawisawis potngor ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ ka ʔæhœʔ mins~θaʔlaʔ mwaiʔ mwaiʔ ris~θaa is~θaa mwaiʔ wawis~θawis~θ potŋor ila.
S.FORM: 'aehae' ka 'aehoe' minsa'la' mwai' mwai' risaa isaa mwai' wawisawis potngor ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ ka ʔæhœʔ mins~θaʔlaʔ mwaiʔ mwaiʔ ris~θaa is~θaa mwaiʔ wawis~θawis~θ potŋor ila.
S.TRANSL: 狗先來,來到那裡.
The dog arrived home ahead and wagged its tail.

S.FORM: hiza 'aehoe' hiza ma' sebeten sebeten koSa.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔæhœʔ hiz~ða maʔ s~θəβətən s~θəβətən koʃa.
S.FORM: hiza 'aehoe' hiza ma' sebeten sebeten koSa.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ʔæhœʔ hiz~ða maʔ s~θəβətən s~θəβətən koʃa.
S.TRANSL: 拍拍那條狗,說道:
The hunters patted the dog and said,

S.FORM: 'ampowa' mwai' kaehngap.
S.PHON: ʔampowaʔ mwaiʔ kæhŋap.
S.FORM: 'ampowa' mwai' kaehngap.
S.PHON: ʔampowaʔ mwaiʔ kæhŋap.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼這麼喘呢?
What is the matter?

S.FORM: 'toet ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: ʔtœt ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.FORM: 'toet ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: ʔtœt ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗 放屁.
The dog farted.

S.FORM: isaa hiza ka minkoringan sawa' ila sawa ila isaa paehraehraengen ila siwa' ila singsingozawen ila.
S.PHON: is~θaa hiz~ða ka minkoriŋan s~θawaʔ ila s~θawa ila is~θaa pæhræhræŋən ila s~θiwaʔ ila s~θiŋs~θiŋoz~ðawən ila.
S.FORM: isaa hiza ka minkoringan sawa' ila sawa ila isaa paehraehraengen ila siwa' ila singsingozawen ila.
S.PHON: is~θaa hiz~ða ka minkoriŋan s~θawaʔ ila s~θawa ila is~θaa pæhræhræŋən ila s~θiwaʔ ila s~θiŋs~θiŋoz~ðawən ila.
S.TRANSL: 那小姑娘笑了.大家跟她商量,她就答應了.
The lady broke out laughing and agreed to talk.

S.FORM: sa nak hini yao hini 'al'alak haysia.
S.PHON: s~θa nak hini jao hini ʔalʔalak hajs~θia.
S.FORM: sa nak hini yao hini 'al'alak haysia.
S.PHON: s~θa nak hini jao hini ʔalʔalak hajs~θia.
S.TRANSL: 像我這樣還年輕.

TRANSL.notes: (She kept asking) I am still young.

S.TRANSL: I am still young.

S.FORM: a yao ni yaba' torongon koSa'en sa'ila ma' toertoroe' ka a tatnon nak hini isaa.
S.PHON: a jao ni jaβaʔ toroŋon koʃaʔən s~θaʔila maʔ tœrtorœʔ ka a tatnon nak hini is~θaa.
S.FORM: a yao ni yaba' torongon koSa'en sa'ila ma' toertoroe' ka a tatnon nak hini isaa.
S.PHON: a jao ni jaβaʔ toroŋon koʃaʔən s~θaʔila maʔ tœrtorœʔ ka a tatnon nak hini is~θaa.
S.TRANSL: 我爸爸叫我去教編織的方法.
My father instructed me to teach people how to weave.

S.FORM: 'oka ila sa' mwai' ila ka imahabaan kama'alep.
S.PHON: ʔoka ila s~θaʔ mwaiʔ ila ka imahaβaan kamaʔaləp.
S.FORM: 'oka ila sa' mwai' ila ka imahabaan kama'alep.
S.PHON: ʔoka ila s~θaʔ mwaiʔ ila ka imahaβaan kamaʔaləp.
S.TRANSL: 來很多人.
There came more hunters.

S.FORM: mwai' a' papnabih koSa hini kabinao' hayza' ka 'al'alak e pakray'aboe ila lasia.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ aʔ papnaβih koʃa hini kaβinaoʔ hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔalʔalak ə pakrajʔaβœ ila las~θia.
S.FORM: mwai' a' papnabih koSa hini kabinao' hayza' ka 'al'alak e pakray'aboe ila lasia.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ aʔ papnaβih koʃa hini kaβinaoʔ hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔalʔalak ə pakrajʔaβœ ila las~θia.
S.TRANSL: 打獵的人回來,談論說,這個小姐和年輕的男生,要讓他們結婚.
The hunters wanted a young man to marry the young lady.

S.FORM: a 'in'alay isaza siwa' hayza' 'aehae' 'al'alak 'ima 'i'ini' rwasek i isaa lasia pakrwaseken ila.
S.PHON: a ʔinʔalaj is~θaz~ða s~θiwaʔ hajz~ðaʔ ʔæhæʔ ʔalʔalak ʔima ʔiʔiniʔ rwas~θək i is~θaa las~θia pakrwas~θəkən ila.
S.FORM: a 'in'alay isaza siwa' hayza' 'aehae' 'al'alak 'ima 'i'ini' rwasek i isaa lasia pakrwaseken ila.
S.PHON: a ʔinʔalaj is~θaz~ða s~θiwaʔ hajz~ðaʔ ʔæhæʔ ʔalʔalak ʔima ʔiʔiniʔ rwas~θək i is~θaa las~θia pakrwas~θəkən ila.
S.TRANSL: 允許他們的婚事.
The young man who has not yet married agreed to get married with her.

S.FORM: isaa rwasek ila isaa hN koza ila kin honahnge hiza ma'.
S.PHON: is~θaa rwas~θək ila is~θaa hn koz~ða ila kin honahŋə hiz~ða maʔ.
S.FORM: isaa rwasek ila isaa hN koza ila kin honahnge hiza ma'.
S.PHON: is~θaa rwas~θək ila is~θaa hn koz~ða ila kin honahŋə hiz~ða maʔ.
S.TRANSL: 結婚後過了很久.
It has been a long time after they got married.

S.FORM: ka hiza minkoringan 'am lobih kosa 'am rima' kala yaba nahan nisia rima' ray 'inkahoelan.
S.PHON: ka hiz~ða minkoriŋan ʔam loβih kos~θa ʔam rimaʔ kala jaβa nahan nis~θia rimaʔ raj ʔinkahœlan.
S.FORM: ka hiza minkoringan 'am lobih kosa 'am rima' kala yaba nahan nisia rima' ray 'inkahoelan.
S.PHON: ka hiz~ða minkoriŋan ʔam loβih kos~θa ʔam rimaʔ kala jaβa nahan nis~θia rimaʔ raj ʔinkahœlan.
S.TRANSL: 結婚後很久,想要回娘家.
After getting married for a long time, the woman asked to go home to her parents' house.

S.FORM: 'am rima' hiza ka 'al'alak rima' oyae ta tanisowaw.
S.PHON: ʔam rimaʔ hiz~ða ka ʔalʔalak rimaʔ ojæ ta tanis~θowaw.
S.FORM: 'am rima' hiza ka 'al'alak rima' oyae ta tanisowaw.
S.PHON: ʔam rimaʔ hiz~ða ka ʔalʔalak rimaʔ ojæ ta tanis~θowaw.
S.TRANSL: 那個年輕人也要跟著去.
Her husband wanted to go with her.

S.FORM: rima' isaa kita'en sa' haw ray ralom izo' kayzaeh taew'an.
S.PHON: rimaʔ is~θaa kitaʔən s~θaʔ haw raj ralom iz~ðoʔ kajz~ðæh tæwʔan.
S.FORM: rima' isaa kita'en sa' haw ray ralom izo' kayzaeh taew'an.
S.PHON: rimaʔ is~θaa kitaʔən s~θaʔ haw raj ralom iz~ðoʔ kajz~ðæh tæwʔan.
S.TRANSL: 看到在水裡有很漂亮的家.
They saw her beautiful house under the water.

S.FORM: o toon akoy atomal o 'ima raam tnon koSa sarara' koSa hini ay 'ima raam tnon.
S.PHON: o toon akoj atomal o ʔima raam tnon koʃa s~θararaʔ koʃa hini aj ʔima raam tnon.
S.FORM: o toon akoy atomal o 'ima raam tnon koSa sarara' koSa hini ay 'ima raam tnon.
S.PHON: o toon akoj atomal o ʔima raam tnon koʃa s~θararaʔ koʃa hini aj ʔima raam tnon.

TRANSL.notes: 那女人已經織了很多衣服, 因為她知道如何編織.(那男生)說我很欣賞很會編織的年輕女孩子.

S.TRANSL: 那女人已經織了很多衣服, 因為她知道如何編織. 說我很欣賞很會編織的年輕女孩子.
The woman had weaved many kinds of clothes for she knew how to weave. The man said he liked girls who knew how to weave.

S.FORM: SaiSiyat nao raam tnon ma' kayzaeh.
S.PHON: ʃaiʃijat nao raam tnon maʔ kajz~ðæh.
S.FORM: SaiSiyat nao raam tnon ma' kayzaeh.
S.PHON: ʃaiʃijat nao raam tnon maʔ kajz~ðæh.
S.TRANSL: 賽夏族假如會編織的話是最好不過.
It would have been good if the SaiSiyat people learned to weave.

S.FORM: isaa lobih naehaen ray ila hao ray SaiSiyat ila.
S.PHON: is~θaa loβih næhæn raj ila hao raj ʃaiʃijat ila.
S.FORM: isaa lobih naehaen ray ila hao ray SaiSiyat ila.
S.PHON: is~θaa loβih næhæn raj ila hao raj ʃaiʃijat ila.
S.TRANSL: 回去賽夏族那邊.
They returned to the SaiSiyat tribe.

S.FORM: ray ima haebaeaen ila isaa rima' sa tatoeroe ila tatoeroe' ka tatnon.
S.PHON: raj ima hæβææn ila is~θaa rimaʔ s~θa tatœrœ ila tatœrœʔ ka tatnon.
S.FORM: ray ima haebaeaen ila isaa rima' sa tatoeroe ila tatoeroe' ka tatnon.
S.PHON: raj ima hæβææn ila is~θaa rimaʔ s~θa tatœrœ ila tatœrœʔ ka tatnon.
S.TRANSL: 去教導編織的方法.
And she taught them how to weave.

S.FORM: toertoeroe'en ka tatnon minsa'la isaa raam ila hayza' 'ima haebaeaen.
S.PHON: tœrtœrœʔən ka tatnon mins~θaʔla is~θaa raam ila hajz~ðaʔ ʔima hæβææn.
S.FORM: toertoeroe'en ka tatnon minsa'la isaa raam ila hayza' 'ima haebaeaen.
S.PHON: tœrtœrœʔən ka tatnon mins~θaʔla is~θaa raam ila hajz~ðaʔ ʔima hæβææn.
S.TRANSL: 先教編織法, 有很多人學會了.
She taught the first batch of weavers and they learned how to weave.

S.FORM: ra raam ila 'isahiza ka kathethel a kathethel koSa'en kathethel isaa makakreng naehaen tortoroe' sizaeh ila hayza' naehaen a e 'ima aroma' towa toertoeroe'en naehaen.
S.PHON: ra raam ila ʔis~θahiz~ða ka kathəthəl a kathəthəl koʃaʔən kathəthəl is~θaa makakrəŋ næhæn tortorœʔ s~θiz~ðæh ila hajz~ðaʔ næhæn a ə ʔima aromaʔ towa tœrtœrœʔən næhæn.
S.FORM: ra raam ila 'isahiza ka kathethel a kathethel koSa'en kathethel isaa makakreng naehaen tortoroe' sizaeh ila hayza' naehaen a e 'ima aroma' towa toertoeroe'en naehaen.
S.PHON: ra raam ila ʔis~θahiz~ða ka kathəthəl a kathəthəl koʃaʔən kathəthəl is~θaa makakrəŋ næhæn tortorœʔ s~θiz~ðæh ila hajz~ðaʔ næhæn a ə ʔima aromaʔ towa tœrtœrœʔən næhæn.
S.TRANSL: 她教完他們編織後, 還有其他人要教.
After she taught them weaving, there was another batch of students and she taught them to weave also.

S.FORM: hiza minsa'la toertoeroe' lasia hayza sail ka 'oka'i 'am tortoroe' ka hayza maybiil.
S.PHON: hiz~ða mins~θaʔla tœrtœrœʔ las~θia hajz~ða s~θail ka ʔokaʔi ʔam tortorœʔ ka hajz~ða majβiil.
S.FORM: hiza minsa'la toertoeroe' lasia hayza sail ka 'oka'i 'am tortoroe' ka hayza maybiil.
S.PHON: hiz~ða mins~θaʔla tœrtœrœʔ las~θia hajz~ða s~θail ka ʔokaʔi ʔam tortorœʔ ka hajz~ða majβiil.
S.TRANSL: 先學過的人有隱藏技術,沒教後學的人.
The first batch of learners did not teach the next batch of learners some skills.

S.FORM: hayza' sail ka a tatnon isaa tatnon noka hiza ka biwa' ka hiza ka kabinao' a 'a'inola' ila pak'a'inola'en ila nihia' kayzaeh tinon.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ s~θail ka a tatnon is~θaa tatnon noka hiz~ða ka βiwaʔ ka hiz~ða ka kaβinaoʔ a ʔaʔinolaʔ ila pakʔaʔinolaʔən ila nihiaʔ kajz~ðæh tinon.
S.FORM: hayza' sail ka a tatnon isaa tatnon noka hiza ka biwa' ka hiza ka kabinao' a 'a'inola' ila pak'a'inola'en ila nihia' kayzaeh tinon.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ s~θail ka a tatnon is~θaa tatnon noka hiz~ða ka βiwaʔ ka hiz~ða ka kaβinaoʔ a ʔaʔinolaʔ ila pakʔaʔinolaʔən ila nihiaʔ kajz~ðæh tinon.
S.TRANSL: 用雷女神編織的技術,先給學的人測驗,再比賽.
They hid some weaving skills from the students, so they held a competition to see who had better weaving skills.

S.FORM: tnon kita'en hini minsa'la' ka toertoeroe' sia 'oka'i i toertoeroe' ka saboeh.
S.PHON: tnon kitaʔən hini mins~θaʔlaʔ ka tœrtœrœʔ s~θia ʔokaʔi i tœrtœrœʔ ka s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: tnon kita'en hini minsa'la' ka toertoeroe' sia 'oka'i i toertoeroe' ka saboeh.
S.PHON: tnon kitaʔən hini mins~θaʔlaʔ ka tœrtœrœʔ s~θia ʔokaʔi i tœrtœrœʔ ka s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 第一批的學生沒有把所有的技巧教給第二批的學生.
The first batch of students did not teach everything to the second batch of students.

S.FORM: nisia hayza sailin.
S.PHON: nis~θia hajz~ða s~θailin.
S.FORM: nisia hayza sailin.
S.PHON: nis~θia hajz~ða s~θailin.
S.TRANSL: 他們有把技術藏起來.
They hid some techniques.

S.FORM: sirae'aew.
S.PHON: s~θiræʔæw.
S.FORM: sirae'aew.
S.PHON: s~θiræʔæw.
S.TRANSL: 他們沒有把所有的技術教給他們.
They did not teach them all the techniques.

S.FORM: on 'insa'an noka ila ka a sapang pak'aynola'en ila.
S.PHON: on ʔins~θaʔan noka ila ka a s~θapaŋ pakʔajnolaʔən ila.
S.FORM: on 'insa'an noka ila ka a sapang pak'aynola'en ila.
S.PHON: on ʔins~θaʔan noka ila ka a s~θapaŋ pakʔajnolaʔən ila.
S.TRANSL: 裁判希望他們正式比賽.
The competition director wanted them to compete with each other.

S.FORM: kita' takita' raam ila isaa.
S.PHON: kitaʔ takitaʔ raam ila is~θaa.
S.FORM: kita' takita' raam ila isaa.
S.PHON: kitaʔ takitaʔ raam ila is~θaa.
S.TRANSL: 看看學會了嗎?
To see if they have learned how to weave.

S.FORM: a a kita'en hiza minsa'la' toertoeroe'oen yo So hayza sail 'oka' i papiko'amet.
S.PHON: a a kitaʔən hiz~ða mins~θaʔlaʔ tœrtœrœʔœn jo ʃo hajz~ða s~θail ʔokaʔ i papikoʔamət.
S.FORM: a a kita'en hiza minsa'la' toertoeroe'oen yo So hayza sail 'oka' i papiko'amet.
S.PHON: a a kitaʔən hiz~ða mins~θaʔlaʔ tœrtœrœʔœn jo ʃo hajz~ða s~θail ʔokaʔ i papikoʔamət.
S.TRANSL: 第一批的學生沒有把所有的技巧教給第二批的學生, 他們有把技術藏起來.
The first batch of students did not teach everything to the second batch of students and concealed the techniques from them.

S.FORM: hiza koSa'en hini mi maybiil 'ima tatoeroe' raam hiza koSa 'isa hiza koSa'en minsa'la' ao sahoewiS ka 'isaa kathethel.
S.PHON: hiz~ða koʃaʔən hini mi majβiil ʔima tatœrœʔ raam hiz~ða koʃa ʔis~θa hiz~ða koʃaʔən mins~θaʔlaʔ ao s~θahœwiʃ ka ʔis~θaa kathəthəl.
S.FORM: hiza koSa'en hini mi maybiil 'ima tatoeroe' raam hiza koSa 'isa hiza koSa'en minsa'la' ao sahoewiS ka 'isaa kathethel.
S.PHON: hiz~ða koʃaʔən hini mi majβiil ʔima tatœrœʔ raam hiz~ða koʃa ʔis~θa hiz~ða koʃaʔən mins~θaʔlaʔ ao s~θahœwiʃ ka ʔis~θaa kathəthəl.
S.TRANSL: 先學的人開始記恨雷女.
The first batch of students hated Kathethel.

S.FORM: hiza ka kathethel ni yaba' nisia torongon koSa'en sa'ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka kathəthəl ni jaβaʔ nis~θia toroŋon koʃaʔən s~θaʔila.
S.FORM: hiza ka kathethel ni yaba' nisia torongon koSa'en sa'ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka kathəthəl ni jaβaʔ nis~θia toroŋon koʃaʔən s~θaʔila.
S.TRANSL: 那個雷女被爸爸叫去.

TRANSL.notes: Kathethel was ordered by her father to go (to teach Atayal).

S.TRANSL: Kathethel was ordered by her father to go .

S.FORM: toertoeroe' 'ana SaypapaaS ma' toertoeroe'.
S.PHON: tœrtœrœʔ ʔana ʃajpapaaʃ maʔ tœrtœrœʔ.
S.FORM: toertoeroe' 'ana SaypapaaS ma' toertoeroe'.
S.PHON: tœrtœrœʔ ʔana ʃajpapaaʃ maʔ tœrtœrœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 泰雅族也可以教.
even teach Saypapa:as .

S.FORM: SaiSiyat hini toertoeroe' ka tnon kayzaeh a raam saboeh.
S.PHON: ʃaiʃijat hini tœrtœrœʔ ka tnon kajz~ðæh a raam s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: SaiSiyat hini toertoeroe' ka tnon kayzaeh a raam saboeh.
S.PHON: ʃaiʃijat hini tœrtœrœʔ ka tnon kajz~ðæh a raam s~θaβœh.

TRANSL.notes: 雷女被她爸爸派去教泰雅族以及賽夏族, (這樣)他們就可以都全部學會.

S.TRANSL: 雷女被她爸爸派去教泰雅族以及賽夏族, 他們就可以都全部學會.
Kathethel was instructed by her father to teach the Atayals as well as the SaiSiyats so they could learn the techniques of weaving.

S.FORM: hiza taykayzaeh mat ma' tnon sizaeh ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða tajkajz~ðæh mat maʔ tnon s~θiz~ðæh ila.
S.FORM: hiza taykayzaeh mat ma' tnon sizaeh ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða tajkajz~ðæh mat maʔ tnon s~θiz~ðæh ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們編織結束.
They have finished weaving.

S.FORM: a 'aynola' sizaeh ila.
S.PHON: a ʔajnolaʔ s~θiz~ðæh ila.
S.FORM: a 'aynola' sizaeh ila.
S.PHON: a ʔajnolaʔ s~θiz~ðæh ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們比賽結束.
They finished competing.

S.FORM: hiza isaa ka ina minsa'la' toertoeroe' hayza sail rae'aew ka anasia ka tatnon.
S.PHON: hiz~ða is~θaa ka ina mins~θaʔlaʔ tœrtœrœʔ hajz~ða s~θail ræʔæw ka anas~θia ka tatnon.
S.FORM: hiza isaa ka ina minsa'la' toertoeroe' hayza sail rae'aew ka anasia ka tatnon.
S.PHON: hiz~ða is~θaa ka ina mins~θaʔlaʔ tœrtœrœʔ hajz~ða s~θail ræʔæw ka anas~θia ka tatnon.
S.TRANSL: 第一批的學生不希望第二批的學生學會織布的秘訣.
The first batch did not want the second batch of students to learn the secrets of weaving.

S.FORM: isaa lasia sa sa'aewhaey ila sahoewisin ila noka a hiza 'ima 'ima minsa'la'.
S.PHON: is~θaa las~θia s~θa s~θaʔæwhæj ila s~θahœwis~θin ila noka a hiz~ða ʔima ʔima mins~θaʔlaʔ.
S.FORM: isaa lasia sa sa'aewhaey ila sahoewisin ila noka a hiza 'ima 'ima minsa'la'.
S.PHON: is~θaa las~θia s~θa s~θaʔæwhæj ila s~θahœwis~θin ila noka a hiz~ða ʔima ʔima mins~θaʔlaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 被先學的人討厭.

TRANSL.notes: (Kathethel was) hated by the first batch of students.

S.TRANSL: hated by the first batch of students.

S.FORM: sahoewisin.
S.PHON: s~θahœwis~θin.
S.FORM: sahoewisin.
S.PHON: s~θahœwis~θin.
S.TRANSL: 他們討厭雷女.
They hated that Kathethel.

S.FORM: hiza ka koSa'en kathethel sia ma ahoewis ila ka'inaz'azem sa yao lobih ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka koʃaʔən kathəthəl s~θia ma ahœwis~θ ila kaʔinaz~ðʔaz~ðəm s~θa jao loβih ila.
S.FORM: hiza ka koSa'en kathethel sia ma ahoewis ila ka'inaz'azem sa yao lobih ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða ka koʃaʔən kathəthəl s~θia ma ahœwis~θ ila kaʔinaz~ðʔaz~ðəm s~θa jao loβih ila.
S.TRANSL: 雷女心情不好, 想要回家了.
Kathethel felt bad and she wanted to go home.

S.FORM: lasia 'ima sasaboeh too' ila tinal'oemaeh ri'saa hayza ila 'aehae' korkoring.
S.PHON: las~θia ʔima s~θas~θaβœh tooʔ ila tinalʔœmæh riʔs~θaa hajz~ða ila ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: lasia 'ima sasaboeh too' ila tinal'oemaeh ri'saa hayza ila 'aehae' korkoring.
S.PHON: las~θia ʔima s~θas~θaβœh tooʔ ila tinalʔœmæh riʔs~θaa hajz~ða ila ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ.
S.TRANSL: 雷女和她的先生在一起三年了, 他們有一個小孩.
Kathethel and her husband had been together for three years and they had a child.

S.FORM: a koSa yao 'am lobih ila kayni' ila honayhini.
S.PHON: a koʃa jao ʔam loβih ila kajniʔ ila honajhini.
S.FORM: a koSa yao 'am lobih ila kayni' ila honayhini.
S.PHON: a koʃa jao ʔam loβih ila kajniʔ ila honajhini.
S.TRANSL: 我要回家了. 我不要留在這裡了.
I wanted to go home. I don't want to stay here.

S.FORM: ma'an moyo toertoeroe'oen raam ila saboeh.
S.PHON: maʔan mojo tœrtœrœʔœn raam ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: ma'an moyo toertoeroe'oen raam ila saboeh.
S.PHON: maʔan mojo tœrtœrœʔœn raam ila s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 我已經全部教你們學會了.
I have taught you and you have learned to weave.

S.FORM: yao 'am lobih ila.
S.PHON: jao ʔam loβih ila.
S.FORM: yao 'am lobih ila.
S.PHON: jao ʔam loβih ila.
S.TRANSL: 我現在要回家了.
I will now return home.

S.FORM: o hini korkoring poa'aw ila 'ita' tatiroSa'.
S.PHON: o hini korkoriŋ poaʔaw ila ʔitaʔ tatiroʃaʔ.
S.FORM: o hini korkoring poa'aw ila 'ita' tatiroSa'.
S.PHON: o hini korkoriŋ poaʔaw ila ʔitaʔ tatiroʃaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩我們要怎麼辦? 我們把他切成兩半吧.
What shall we do with this child? Let's cut him in half.

S.FORM: lasia kamamanraan lasia haehaeih ila isaa koSa So'o ka kamanraan ma' spong ila.
S.PHON: las~θia kamamanraan las~θia hæhæih ila is~θaa koʃa ʃoʔo ka kamanraan maʔ s~θpoŋ ila.
S.FORM: lasia kamamanraan lasia haehaeih ila isaa koSa So'o ka kamanraan ma' spong ila.
S.PHON: las~θia kamamanraan las~θia hæhæih ila is~θaa koʃa ʃoʔo ka kamanraan maʔ s~θpoŋ ila.
S.TRANSL: 丈夫被要求作決定, 想辦法.
The husband was asked to make a decision.

S.FORM: taka'ino'on 'am 'a'apol sa tatiroSa'.
S.PHON: takaʔinoʔon ʔam ʔaʔapol s~θa tatiroʃaʔ.
S.FORM: taka'ino'on 'am 'a'apol sa tatiroSa'.
S.PHON: takaʔinoʔon ʔam ʔaʔapol s~θa tatiroʃaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 要怎麼分成兩份?
How do we cut him in half?

S.FORM: tiroSa'an ta'oeloeh noka 'isaa minkoringan.
S.PHON: tiroʃaʔan taʔœlœh noka ʔis~θaa minkoriŋan.
S.FORM: tiroSa'an ta'oeloeh noka 'isaa minkoringan.
S.PHON: tiroʃaʔan taʔœlœh noka ʔis~θaa minkoriŋan.

TRANSL.notes: 那個小孩子的頭被(雷)女切成兩半.

S.TRANSL: 那個小孩子的頭被 女切成兩半.
Kathethel cut his head in two.

S.FORM: mari'in la ho ray ralom sitakopok.
S.PHON: mariʔin la ho raj ralom s~θitakopok.
S.FORM: mari'in la ho ray ralom sitakopok.
S.PHON: mariʔin la ho raj ralom s~θitakopok.
S.TRANSL: 然後丟到水中.
And tossed the head into the water.

S.FORM: isaa basang ila noka kamanraan ma.
S.PHON: is~θaa βas~θaŋ ila noka kamanraan ma.
S.FORM: isaa basang ila noka kamanraan ma.
S.PHON: is~θaa βas~θaŋ ila noka kamanraan ma.
S.TRANSL: 那個身體就給男人.
The child's body was given to the husband.

S.FORM: maehraehrang koSa 'aehae' sinangayan o mwai' ila 'ita' tapkakita' na mwai' 'aehae' sinangayan.
S.PHON: mæhræhraŋ koʃa ʔæhæʔ s~θinaŋajan o mwaiʔ ila ʔitaʔ tapkakitaʔ na mwaiʔ ʔæhæʔ s~θinaŋajan.
S.FORM: maehraehrang koSa 'aehae' sinangayan o mwai' ila 'ita' tapkakita' na mwai' 'aehae' sinangayan.
S.PHON: mæhræhraŋ koʃa ʔæhæʔ s~θinaŋajan o mwaiʔ ila ʔitaʔ tapkakitaʔ na mwaiʔ ʔæhæʔ s~θinaŋajan.
S.TRANSL: 過了一星期之後就來碰面.
They decided to meet after a week.

S.FORM: mwai' kakita' oN kita'en noka minkoringan hiza ta'oeloeh pa'apol hini basang 'oka' ila kita'en ibabaw ila.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ kakitaʔ on kitaʔən noka minkoriŋan hiz~ða taʔœlœh paʔapol hini βas~θaŋ ʔokaʔ ila kitaʔən iβaβaw ila.
S.FORM: mwai' kakita' oN kita'en noka minkoringan hiza ta'oeloeh pa'apol hini basang 'oka' ila kita'en ibabaw ila.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ kakitaʔ on kitaʔən noka minkoriŋan hiz~ða taʔœlœh paʔapol hini βas~θaŋ ʔokaʔ ila kitaʔən iβaβaw ila.
S.TRANSL: 給女人的小孩頭沒有身體, 可是它有長高.
The child's head given to the woman doesn't have a body anymore, but it has grown taller.

S.FORM: hiza noka kamamanraan pa'apol ila naw basang nanaw 'oka' ka ta'oeloeh.
S.PHON: hiz~ða noka kamamanraan paʔapol ila naw βas~θaŋ nanaw ʔokaʔ ka taʔœlœh.
S.FORM: hiza noka kamamanraan pa'apol ila naw basang nanaw 'oka' ka ta'oeloeh.
S.PHON: hiz~ða noka kamamanraan paʔapol ila naw βas~θaŋ nanaw ʔokaʔ ka taʔœlœh.
S.TRANSL: 給男人的小孩身體沒有頭.
The man was given the child's body without a head.

S.FORM: book ila 'oka' ila ka bori masay ila.
S.PHON: βook ila ʔokaʔ ila ka βori mas~θaj ila.
S.FORM: book ila 'oka' ila ka bori masay ila.
S.PHON: βook ila ʔokaʔ ila ka βori mas~θaj ila.
S.TRANSL: 身體腐爛了; 沒有肉, 已經死了.
The body has rotted; it did not have any flesh, and was already dead.

S.FORM: koSa'en e ka tatnon 日wa日 inoka ka SaiSiyat a ka ino inoka biwa' minkoringan mwai' toertoeroe' ma' isaza.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ə ka tatnon *wa* inoka ka ʃaiʃijat a ka ino inoka βiwaʔ minkoriŋan mwaiʔ tœrtœrœʔ maʔ is~θaz~ða.
S.FORM: koSa'en e ka tatnon 日wa日 inoka ka SaiSiyat a ka ino inoka biwa' minkoringan mwai' toertoeroe' ma' isaza.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən ə ka tatnon *wa* inoka ka ʃaiʃijat a ka ino inoka βiwaʔ minkoriŋan mwaiʔ tœrtœrœʔ maʔ is~θaz~ða.
S.TRANSL: 織布法是雷女教的.
Weaving was taught by Biwa'.

S.FORM: ta noka 'isaza tabin isaza hini raam ila 'al'alak haysani koSa'en.
S.PHON: ta noka ʔis~θaz~ða taβin is~θaz~ða hini raam ila ʔalʔalak hajs~θani koʃaʔən.
S.FORM: ta noka 'isaza tabin isaza hini raam ila 'al'alak haysani koSa'en.
S.PHON: ta noka ʔis~θaz~ða taβin is~θaz~ða hini raam ila ʔalʔalak hajs~θani koʃaʔən.
S.TRANSL: 年輕人知道如何織布是因為雷女教的.
The young people knew how to weave because Biwa' taught them.

S.FORM: 'ana SaypapaaS SaiSiyat ma' raam tnon hiza.
S.PHON: ʔana ʃajpapaaʃ ʃaiʃijat maʔ raam tnon hiz~ða.
S.FORM: 'ana SaypapaaS SaiSiyat ma' raam tnon hiza.
S.PHON: ʔana ʃajpapaaʃ ʃaiʃijat maʔ raam tnon hiz~ða.
S.TRANSL: 泰雅族和賽夏族都學會了織布的方法.
Both Atayals and SaiSiyats learned how to weave.

S.FORM: 'a'aringan Sa biwa' 'ima tnon ina toertoeroe' ka tatnon.
S.PHON: ʔaʔariŋan ʃa βiwaʔ ʔima tnon ina tœrtœrœʔ ka tatnon.
S.FORM: 'a'aringan Sa biwa' 'ima tnon ina toertoeroe' ka tatnon.
S.PHON: ʔaʔariŋan ʃa βiwaʔ ʔima tnon ina tœrtœrœʔ ka tatnon.
S.TRANSL: 是雷神最早教人們織布的方法.
It was at first Kathethel who taught the people how to weave.

S.FORM: papay 'isaa ma' payakai.
S.PHON: papaj ʔis~θaa maʔ pajakai.
S.FORM: papay 'isaa ma' payakai.
S.PHON: papaj ʔis~θaa maʔ pajakai.
S.TRANSL: 我的故事就到這裡.
My story ends here.
